title: Debug Precedence, Interpolation, Composition, and Missing States
summary: Build and verify css animation debug in ethical launch transform and animation conflict incident through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.

Apply css animation debug without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 05 · Read the ethical launch transform and animation conflict incident case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 5: Which claim preserves css animation debug when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: ethical launch transform and animation conflict incident.
steps.why: Debug Precedence, Interpolation, Composition, and Missing States makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 5 in ethical launch transform and animation conflict incident.

content.text: Animations can override ordinary declarations for animated properties, shorthands reset omitted longhands, duplicate keyframe names can replace earlier rules, and transform animation usually replaces a separate transform rather than merging automatically. Missing endpoints, nonanimatable values, fill mode, play state, negative delay, and reduced-motion overrides can all explain surprises. Reduce the case and inspect the Animations and Computed panels before patching. Apply it to ethical launch transform and animation conflict incident.
